Get carrion consumption rates

Source: R/components.R
getCarrionConsumption.Rd

Returns a named vector with one entry for each species giving the rate in grams/year at which that species consumes carrion, plus a decompose entry for bacterial decomposition.

Usage

getCarrionConsumption(params, ...)

Arguments

params

A MizerParams object.

...

Unused

Value

A named vector with the consumption rates from all species and decomposition.

See also

getCarrionProduction(), carrion_dynamics(), getDetritusConsumption()
